title: How to kill a sin that keeps coming back
caption:
The sin you keep going back to isn't stronger than you. You just haven't killed it.

Name it exactly. Vague confessions protect you from the specifics — and the specifics are where the power is.

Remove the on-ramp. Not just the urge in the moment. The conditions that set it up hours before.

Tell one man the specific thing. That's the moment most men never get to. And it's where the grip starts breaking.

Then replace it. A vacuum doesn't stay empty.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16

Save this and send it to the man you've been meaning to be honest with.

#faith #christianmen #purity #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #accountability #christianity
